title: Support chat toolbar: capture, files, remote help (dbg147)
description:
PipeShare support chat now has a live-session toolbar with Minimize, Screen capture (snipping tool), Upload file, and Request remote help (customers only). Screen capture minimizes chat, lets you drag-select a region, then auto-sends the screenshot as an in-chat image.

File send works via drag-and-drop or Upload file (single file or folder zipped client-side). The peer gets an in-chat Accept/Decline prompt; accept delivers the file, decline shows themed warning system messages on each side.

Customers in an active chat can request remote help; the connected admin sees Accept/Decline in chat. If accepted, the customer shares their tab to the admin using the existing WebRTC remote session flow (customer as sharer).

Who is affected: Horizon admins and customers on the OVH private server using PipeShare support chat. Deploy horizon-backend (new routes + DB column migrations) and client-portal static assets (dbg147 cache bust). SaaS updates only via releases.html.
changeLog: Chat header toolbar: Minimize, Screen capture, Upload file, Request remote help.
Snipping overlay with theme crosshair; screenshot auto-sent as chat image.
Drag-and-drop and file/folder upload with peer accept/decline flow.
Customer-initiated remote help with admin in-chat consent and WebRTC attach.
System messages: info and warning variants; image/file attachment rendering.
Backend: attachment upload, file-offer/respond, customer-request/admin-respond routes.
Cache bust dbg147 (portal runtime + PipeShare manifest).
